title: Pin date/answer header above scrolling guess rows in mobile board entry
description: Mobile board-entry sheet auto-scrolls to follow the active guess row, which pushed the Wordle answer out of view. Moved the date picker and answer field out of the scroll container in src/components/action-buttons/board-entry/form.tsx into a pinned shrink-0 header row so the answer stays visible while entering guesses. Commit d4d224a on feat/mobile-ux-fixes.
close_reason: Implemented in commit d4d224a on feat/mobile-ux-fixes; typecheck passes
